nodes.label: Dulang Product
nodes.description: Mobile app screenshot of Dulang Smart Warehouse product listing screen. Shows a product verification workflow with tabs: All, Verified, Pending. Lists 'iPhone 14 Pro' (Supplier: grab, Category: SmartPhone, Stock: 20/20, Status: Verified) and 'Samsung Smart TV' (Supplier: blibli, Category: Television, Stock: 0/0, Status: Pending). UI includes search bar, verification progress indicator showing '1 of 2 verified', and bottom navigation with Products, Suppliers, and Profile tabs. App branding shows 'DULANG smart warehouse' in teal/mint color scheme.

nodes.label: Dulang Smart Warehouse App
nodes.description: Mobile warehouse management application with product verification features, supplier tracking, and inventory management.

nodes.label: Products Screen
nodes.description: Product listing screen with search, verification progress, and filter tabs (All, Verified, Pending).

nodes.label: iPhone 14 Pro Product Card
nodes.description: Product entry: iPhone 14 Pro, Supplier grab, Category SmartPhone, Stock 20/20, Status Verified. Has Verify and History action buttons.

nodes.label: Samsung Smart TV Product Card
nodes.description: Product entry: Samsung Smart TV, Supplier blibli, Category Television, Stock 0/0, Status Pending.
